bookedAt() - Method in record class io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.datarecords.BookingData
Returns the value of the bookedAt record component.
BookingData - Record Class in io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.datarecords
Data record representing a flight booking, which may include multiple passengers.
BookingData(Integer, String, String, double, int, int, String, int, String, LocalDateTime, String, List<CustomerData>) - Constructor for record class io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.datarecords.BookingData
Constructor without flight data
BookingData(Integer, String, String, double, int, int, String, int, String, LocalDateTime, String, List<CustomerData>, FlightData) - Constructor for record class io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.datarecords.BookingData
Constructor for backward compatibility with older code
BookingData(Integer, String, String, double, int, int, String, int, String, LocalDateTime, String, List<CustomerData>, FlightData, List<FlightData>) - Constructor for record class io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.datarecords.BookingData
Creates an instance of a BookingData record class.
BookingData(Integer, String, String, double, int, int, String, String) - Constructor for record class io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.datarecords.BookingData
Constructor with basic flight information and no customers (for reading from database)
BookingData(String, String, double, int, int, String, int, String, String, List<CustomerData>) - Constructor for record class io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.datarecords.BookingData
Constructor with default ID and booking time but without flight data.
BookingData(String, String, double, int, int, String, int, String, String, List<CustomerData>, FlightData, List<FlightData>) - Constructor for record class io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.datarecords.BookingData
Constructor with default ID and booking time.
